    Add a card to the deck
    add(Card) - Method in class org.atlanmod.risk.Hand
    Adds the card to the hand
    addAdjacencies(List<Country>) - Method in class org.atlanmod.risk.Country
    Used only when contstructing the country object, it should not be called after the board is initialized
    addCountry(Country) - Method in class org.atlanmod.risk.Player
    When a player conquers a country the country needs to be added to a data structure that keeps track of all the countries the player occupies

    addRiskCard(Card) - Method in class org.atlanmod.risk.Player
    Adds a risk card to the players hand

    This class sets up the countries and continents on the org.atlanmod.risk.Risk game board.

    D

    Deck - Class in org.atlanmod.risk
    Allows the creation of the org.atlanmod.risk.Risk deck containing the 42 org.atlanmod.risk.Risk cards.
    Deck(List<Country>) - Constructor for class org.atlanmod.risk.Deck
    Creates all 42 cards, one for each territory.
    decrementArmies(int) - Method in class org.atlanmod.risk.Country
     
    decrementArmies(int) - Method in class org.atlanmod.risk.Player
    Decreases the count of the number of numArmies the player has on the board This count has to reflect the actual number of numArmies the players has on the board
    Dice - Class in org.atlanmod.risk
    Allows the creation of org.atlanmod.risk.Risk org.atlanmod.risk.Dice objects used to handle player rolling.
    Dice() - Constructor for class org.atlanmod.risk.Dice
     
    draw() - Method in class org.atlanmod.risk.Deck
    Removes a card from the deck and return it

    fortify(String, String) - Method in class org.atlanmod.risk.RiskModel
    Handles the fortify function.

    G

    getAdjacencies() - Method in class org.atlanmod.risk.Country
    Returns a list of the country objects that are adjacent to this country on the baord
    getAdjacencies(String) - Method in class org.atlanmod.risk.Board
    Returns a list of the country objects that are the countries adjacent to the country specified by the string countryName on the board
    getAI() - Method in class org.atlanmod.risk.Player
     
    getArmies() - Method in class org.atlanmod.risk.Country
    Returns the number of armies currently stationed in this country
    getArmies() - Method in class org.atlanmod.risk.Player
     
    getBoard() - Method in class org.atlanmod.risk.RiskModel
     
    getBonusArmies() - Method in class org.atlanmod.risk.Continent
    Returns the number of bonus armies a player gets per round when the player controls this continent
    getBonusArmies(String) - Method in class org.atlanmod.risk.Board
    Returns the number of bonus armies awarded to a player for controlling all the countries in the continent whose name is the string continentName
    getCards() - Method in class org.atlanmod.risk.Hand
    Returns the hand
    getCardsList() - Method in class org.atlanmod.risk.RiskModel
    Creates and returns the information for the cardsList in the org.atlanmod.risk.BoardView.
    getContinentByName(String) - Method in class org.atlanmod.risk.Board
    Returns the continent object whose name is the string continentName
    getContinents() - Method in class org.atlanmod.risk.Board
    Returns a list containing the continent objects the board has
    getCountries() - Method in class org.atlanmod.risk.Board
    Returns a list of all of the country objects in the board
    getCountry() - Method in class org.atlanmod.risk.Card
     
    getCountryAList() - Method in class org.atlanmod.risk.RiskModel
    Creates and returns the information for the countryAList in the org.atlanmod.risk.BoardView.
    getCountryBList() - Method in class org.atlanmod.risk.RiskModel
    Creates and returns the information for the countryBList in the org.atlanmod.risk.BoardView.
    getCountryByName(String) - Method in class org.atlanmod.risk.Board
    Returns the country object for the country specified by the string countryName
    getHand() - Method in class org.atlanmod.risk.Player
     
    getHandObject() - Method in class org.atlanmod.risk.Player
     
    getIndex() - Method in class org.atlanmod.risk.Player
     
    getMemberCountries() - Method in class org.atlanmod.risk.Continent
    Retuens a list of the country objects that are on this continent
    getMemberCountries(String) - Method in class org.atlanmod.risk.Board
    Returns a list of the country objects that are in the continent specified by the string continentName

    Returns the number of armies currently in the country specified by the string countryName

    Returns the player object who currently occupies the country
    getOccupant(String) - Method in class org.atlanmod.risk.Board
    Returns the player object that currently occupies the country specufied by string countryName

    I

    incrementArmies(int) - Method in class org.atlanmod.risk.Country
     
    incrementArmies(int) - Method in class org.atlanmod.risk.Player
    Increases the count of the number of numArmies the player has on the board This count has to reflect the actual number of numArmies the players has on the board
    initializeGame(ArrayList<String>, ArrayList<String>) - Method in class org.atlanmod.risk.RiskModel
    Sets up the org.atlanmod.risk.Risk game.

    L

    loadBoard(String[], String[], String[]) - Method in class org.atlanmod.risk.Board
    Loads the information needed to construct the board and constructs the country and continent objects needed for the board from three files.

    R

    reinforce(String) - Method in class org.atlanmod.risk.RiskModel
    Handles placing reinforcements.
    removeCards(int[]) - Method in class org.atlanmod.risk.Player
    Removed a set of risk cards from the players hand to reflect risk cards being turned in
    removeCardsFromHand(int, int, int) - Method in class org.atlanmod.risk.Hand
    Removes the cards at the given indices from the hand
    removeCountry(String) - Method in class org.atlanmod.risk.Player
    When a player loses a country, the country must be removed from the data structure tracking which countries the player occupies
    Risk - Class in org.atlanmod.risk
    This class contains the main() method that creates a model, a view, and a controller, passing the model and the view to the controller.
    Risk() - Constructor for class org.atlanmod.risk.Risk

    This class maps the user's actions in the org.atlanmod.risk.RiskView to the data and methods in the model.

    Constructs the main menu.

    Returns an integer array of values between 1 and 6 representing the outcome of rolling the dice.

    S

    setCountryASelection(String) - Method in class org.atlanmod.risk.RiskModel
    Receives information on which country is selected in countryAList.
    setNumArmies(int) - Method in class org.atlanmod.risk.Country
    Used to set the number of armies currently stationed in this country
    setNumberArmies(String, int) - Method in class org.atlanmod.risk.Board
    Sets the number of armies currently in the country specified by the string countryName to the integer supplied as an argument
    setOccupant(String, Player) - Method in class org.atlanmod.risk.Board
    Sets the occupant of the country object specified by the string countryName to be the player object supplied as an argument.
    setOccupant(Player) - Method in class org.atlanmod.risk.Country
    When a player conquers a country the player object is set as the occupant of the country
    setPlayerCount(int) - Method in class org.atlanmod.risk.RiskModel
    Sets the number of players.
    shuffle() - Method in class org.atlanmod.risk.Deck
    Shuffle the deck of cards

    Starts the game and prints out welcome messages.
